name: Optimizing Clinical Trial Protocols Using EHR-Derived Heterogeneous Treatment Effects

description: arXiv:2607.16934v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Traditional randomized trials often obscure clinically meaningful heterogeneity in treatment response by focusing on average effects. Leveraging real-world data to emulate clinical trials and estimate heterogeneous treatment effects (HTEs) offers a promising path toward more precise and efficient trial design. In this study, we emulate the DAPA-...
author: Xiaodi Li, Munhuwan Lee, Pengyang Li, Xiaoke Liu, Jose K. James, Patricia A. Pellikka, Cui Tao, Nansu Zong
